boxplot: The image shows a set of labeled boxplots. Each box spans the interquartile range, the line inside the box marks the median, and the whiskers show the minimum and maximum values shown.
The figure shows a set of labeled boxplots. Each box spans the interquartile range, the line inside the box marks the median, and the whiskers show the minimum and maximum values shown.
The visual shows a set of labeled boxplots. Each box spans the interquartile range, the line inside the box marks the median, and the whiskers show the minimum and maximum values shown.
The chart shows a set of labeled boxplots. Each box spans the interquartile range, the line inside the box marks the median, and the whiskers show the minimum and maximum values shown.
The panel shows a set of labeled boxplots. Each box spans the interquartile range, the line inside the box marks the median, and the whiskers show the minimum and maximum values shown.
paired_boxplot: The image shows two side-by-side boxplot panels with matching labels. The left panel is Before and the right panel is After.
The figure shows two side-by-side boxplot panels with matching labels. The left panel is Before and the right panel is After.
The visual shows two side-by-side boxplot panels with matching labels. The left panel is Before and the right panel is After.
The chart shows two side-by-side boxplot panels with matching labels. The left panel is Before and the right panel is After.
The panel shows two side-by-side boxplot panels with matching labels. The left panel is Before and the right panel is After.

median_top_second_difference_value: What is the difference between the highest median and the second-highest median?
Subtract the second-highest median from the highest median. What value do you get?
Find the median value gap between the top-ranked boxplot and the second-ranked boxplot.
Compute the difference from the highest boxplot median to the second-highest boxplot median.
What integer difference separates the largest median from the second-largest median?
median_top_third_difference_value: What is the difference between the highest median and the third-highest median?
Subtract the third-highest median from the highest median. What value do you get?
Find the median value gap between the top-ranked boxplot and the third-ranked boxplot.
Compute the difference from the highest boxplot median to the third-highest boxplot median.
What integer difference separates the largest median from the third-largest median?
median_top_bottom_difference_value: What is the difference between the highest median and the lowest median?
Subtract the lowest median from the highest median. What value do you get?
Find the median value gap between the top-ranked boxplot and the bottom-ranked boxplot.
Compute the difference from the highest boxplot median to the lowest boxplot median.
What integer difference separates the largest median from the smallest median?
paired_median_greatest_increase_label: Compare each label's median in the After panel with the same label's median in the Before panel. Which label has the greatest median increase?
Using After minus Before for each label, which label has the largest median increase?
Which label's boxplot in the After panel has the biggest median gain over its matching boxplot in the Before panel?
Find the label with the greatest increase from its Before median to its After median.
Which matched label shows the largest upward median shift from Before to After?
paired_median_greatest_decrease_label: Compare each label's median in the Before panel with the same label's median in the After panel. Which label has the greatest median decrease?
Using Before minus After for each label, which label has the largest median decrease?
Which label's boxplot in the After panel drops the most below its matching boxplot in the Before panel?
Find the label with the greatest decrease from its Before median to its After median.
Which matched label shows the largest downward median shift from Before to After?
paired_median_greatest_absolute_change_l: Compare each label's median in the Before and After panels. Which label has the greatest absolute median change?
Which matched label has the largest absolute difference between its Before and After medians?
Find the label whose two boxplot medians are farthest apart.
Which label shows the largest median change in either direction between Before and After?
Determine the label with the greatest absolute shift from its Before median to its After median.
largest_iqr_label: Which label has the {extremum_direction} interquartile range?
Find the label of the boxplot with the {iqr_width_phrase} interquartile range.
Determine which labeled boxplot has the {extremum_direction} IQR.
What label corresponds to the {extremum_direction} interquartile range?
Identify the boxplot label with the {iqr_width_phrase} box.
smallest_iqr_label: Which label has the {extremum_direction} interquartile range?
Find the label of the boxplot with the {iqr_width_phrase} interquartile range.
Determine which labeled boxplot has the {extremum_direction} IQR.
What label corresponds to the {extremum_direction} interquartile range?
Identify the boxplot label with the {iqr_width_phrase} box.

query:median_top_second_difference_value.answer_hint: set "answer" to the median difference as an integer
query:median_top_second_difference_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object with keys "highest_median_boxplot" and "second_highest_median_boxplot", each mapped to an [x,y] pixel center point of that boxplot

query:median_top_third_difference_value.answer_hint: set "answer" to the median difference as an integer
query:median_top_third_difference_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object with keys "highest_median_boxplot" and "third_highest_median_boxplot", each mapped to an [x,y] pixel center point of that boxplot

query:median_top_bottom_difference_value.answer_hint: set "answer" to the median difference as an integer
query:median_top_bottom_difference_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object with keys "highest_median_boxplot" and "lowest_median_boxplot", each mapped to an [x,y] pixel center point of that boxplot

query:paired_median_greatest_increase_la.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible matched label as a string
query:paired_median_greatest_increase_la.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object with keys "before_boxplot" and "after_boxplot", each mapped to the [x,y] pixel center point of that winning label's boxplot in the corresponding panel

query:paired_median_greatest_decrease_la.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible matched label as a string
query:paired_median_greatest_decrease_la.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object with keys "before_boxplot" and "after_boxplot", each mapped to the [x,y] pixel center point of that winning label's boxplot in the corresponding panel

query:paired_median_greatest_absolute_ch.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible matched label as a string
query:paired_median_greatest_absolute_ch.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object with keys "before_boxplot" and "after_boxplot", each mapped to the [x,y] pixel center point of that winning label's boxplot in the corresponding panel

query:largest_iqr_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible boxplot label as a string
query:largest_iqr_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the winning boxplot's interquartile-range rectangle

query:smallest_iqr_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible boxplot label as a string
query:smallest_iqr_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the winning boxplot's interquartile-range rectangle
